revealed_facts: Transmission fluid service overdue by 18,000 miles; last changed at 61,000 instead of recommended 45,000-mile intervals

review.review_text: Seller actively misrepresented the vehicle's maintenance history, claiming a 'clean bill of health' despite a significantly overdue transmission service, and failed to disclose body damage.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent on passenger rear fender with minor paint cracking, not visible in listing photos
